---
title: "homework 7 frania darringer"
format: html
---
```{r}
# frania darringer

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

str(iris)
dim(iris)

iris1 <- iris %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("versicolor", "virginica"),
         Sepal.Length > 6,
         Sepal.Width > 2.5)

dim(iris1)

iris2 <- iris1 %>%
  select(Species, Sepal.Length, Sepal.Width)

dim(iris2)

iris3 <- iris2 %>%
  arrange(desc(Sepal.Length))

head(iris3)

iris4 <- iris3 %>%
  mutate(Sepal.Area = Sepal.Length * Sepal.Width)

dim(iris4)

iris5 <- iris4 %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Sepal_Length = mean(Sepal.Length),
    Avg_Sepal_Width  = mean(Sepal.Width),
    Sample_Size      = n()
  )

print(iris5)

iris6 <- iris4 %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Sepal_Length = mean(Sepal.Length),
    Avg_Sepal_Width  = mean(Sepal.Width),
    Sample_Size      = n()
  )

print(iris6)

iris_final <- iris %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("versicolor", "virginica"),
         Sepal.Length > 6,
         Sepal.Width > 2.5) %>%
  select(Species, Sepal.Length, Sepal.Width) %>%
  arrange(desc(Sepal.Length)) %>%
  mutate(Sepal.Area = Sepal.Length * Sepal.Width)

head(iris_final)

iris_long <- iris %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Sepal.Length, Sepal.Width, Petal.Length, Petal.Width),
    names_to = "Measure",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  select(Species, Measure, Value)

head(iris_long)

```
